# Test fixture — small llms.txt covering 9 locales + housing exclusions

## Courses

- [English Language Courses in USA & Canada | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/courses): Study English with CEL.
- [English Plus Cambridge Prep in USA & Canada | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/courses/english-plus-cambridge-prep): Cambridge FCE prep.

## Housing

- [Student Housing](https://www.englishcollege.com/housing): Find housing.
- [Vancouver Shared Apartment](https://www.englishcollege.com/vc/shared-apartment-downtown): VC slug — should be excluded.
- [San Diego Premium Homestay](https://www.englishcollege.com/sd/premium-homestay): SD slug — should be excluded.
- [Santa Monica Comfort Apartment](https://www.englishcollege.com/sm/apartment-comfort): SM slug — should be excluded.

## Blog

- [Why CEL San Diego](https://www.englishcollege.com/post/why-cel-san-diego): EN blog post.
- [Sprachaufenthalt Kalifornien](https://www.englishcollege.com/de/post/sprachaufenthalt-kalifornien): DE-only post.
- [Cours Anglais Vancouver](https://www.englishcollege.com/fr/post/cours-anglais-vancouver): FR-only post.

## German pages

- [Englischkurse USA Kanada | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/de/kurse): German courses page.
- [Studentenunterkunft](https://www.englishcollege.com/de/housing): German housing page.

## French pages

- [Cours d'anglais USA Canada | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/fr/cours): French courses page.

## Italian pages

- [Corsi di inglese | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/it/corsi): Italian courses page.

## Spanish pages

- [Cursos de ingles | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/es/cursos): Spanish courses page.

## Portuguese pages

- [Cursos de ingles | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/pt/cursos): Portuguese courses page.

## Korean pages

- [영어 과정 | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/ko/courses): Korean courses page.

## Japanese pages

- [英語コース | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/ja/courses): Japanese courses page.

## Arabic pages

- [دورات اللغة الإنجليزية | CEL](https://www.englishcollege.com/ar/courses): Arabic courses page.
